text.message: that was some high level trading red

wood for wheat, ore for wheat
wanna do 2 wood for 2 wheat orange?

and I hhave been robbed as much as you fs

at this point im basically in last

now we can all stop sweating the double play

like the only thing which would be nice is if you have only knights
